description: CPU affinity and priority tuning (optional feature)

platform_notes.macOS: Core pinning is advisory (scheduler may still migrate). setpriority requires root.
platform_notes.linux: Core pinning enforced via sched_setaffinity. nice/setpriority available.

benefit: Reduces p99 latency variance by eliminating core migration. Main benefit is for latency-critical servers, not median latency.
default: OFF — not enabled by default. Users can opt-in for latency-critical deployments.
